description: CI and test coverage: add a GitHub Actions workflow that runs pytest and coverage on Python 3.10-3.12 with GUI tests in off-screen mode. Add CLI tests using Typer CliRunner, GUI smoke tests using pytest-qt, and mocked tests for translator backends, languages mapping, wakelock, and memory/glossary modules.
steps: Create .github/workflows/ci.yml that: (1) runs on push/PR to main and release/** branches, (2) tests on Python 3.10, 3.11, 3.12, (3) installs system deps (libgl1, libegl1, libxkbcommon0, libdbus-1-3), (4) pip install -e '.[gui,dev]' plus pytest-qt pytest-cov, (5) runs QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen pytest -q --cov=stx --cov-report=term-missing
Create tests/conftest.py with shared fixtures: sample_doc (Document with mixed entries), mock_translator (CountingTranslator), tmp_stf (temp file fixture), temp_tm (TranslationMemory in tmp_path)
Create tests/test_cli.py with Typer CliRunner tests covering: stx --version, stx info, stx stf2xlsx, stx validate (exit codes), stx backends, stx scope new/show. Use tmp_path for file fixtures.

Create tests/test_backends.py with mocked tests for: (1) factory.make_backend('google') returns GoogleFreeTranslator, (2) make_backend unknown key raises ValueError, (3) list_backends returns 4 items, (4) DeepL/Azure/OpenAI missing key raises ValueError, (5) mock network calls to verify retry/protect behavior
Create tests/test_languages.py testing: code_for_language, language_for_code, to_google_code, supported_language_names
Create tests/test_wakelock.py testing: platform dispatch with mocked sys.platform, context manager acquire/release, no-op when tool missing
Create tests/gui/__init__.py and tests/gui/test_smoke.py with pytest-qt tests: MainWindow constructs with 6 pages, settings dialog opens, about dialog opens. Use QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen.
Add pytest-qt to pyproject.toml [project.optional-dependencies] dev list
acceptance_criteria: pytest -q runs all new tests successfully
tests/test_cli.py covers at least stx --version, info, stf2xlsx, validate, backends
tests/test_backends.py covers factory functions and mocked backend behavior
tests/test_languages.py covers the language mapping functions
Total test count increases significantly (target: 90+ tests)
findings: All 114 tests pass (up from 74 baseline). GUI smoke tests work with QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen. pytest-qt auto-detects PySide6. The conftest.py sets the env var at import time so GUI tests work even without explicit env setup. CI workflow covers Python 3.10-3.12 matrix.
